Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: A customer in the tally system.

photoUrl.description: URL to the customer's profile picture.

totalBalance.description: The current balance of the customer.

ownerId.description: The UID of the shopkeeper who owns this customer record.

customerUid.description: The UID of the customer's own Firebase Auth account (if registered).

User.title: User
User.description: A user in the system (shopkeeper or customer).

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A credit or debit transaction for a customer.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this transaction belongs to.

note.description: A brief description of the transaction.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this transaction record.

PaymentNotification.title: PaymentNotification
PaymentNotification.description: A notification sent by a customer when they make a payment.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who sent the notification.

senderPhone.description: The phone number used to send the payment.

transactionId.description: The transaction ID or tracking number.

isRead.description: Whether the notification has been read by the customer (for status updates).

ownerId.description: The UID of the shopkeeper who should receive this notification.

InAppMessage.title: InAppMessage
InAppMessage.description: A message sent between a shopkeeper and a customer.

isRead.description: Whether the message has been read.

payment_notifications.description: Collection of payment notifications sent by customers.

in_app_messages.description: Collection of messages between shopkeepers and customers.

users.description: Collection of user profiles (shopkeepers and customers).
